reasons: openclaw provides the most complete and executable implementation with all required components: continuous rise check (0.5%-4% daily), linear regression with scipy.stats.linregress for volume analysis, R² calculation (>0.6), cumulative return check (8%-20%), and turnover rate validation (3%-8%)
The code is fully functional with proper error handling, progress tracking, and complete main() execution flow that attempts to fetch real data via akshare
openclaw correctly implements all 4 conditions as AND logic with proper boundary checks, and produces the required output format in gentle_rise.txt

While all three agents (codex, claudecode, openclaw) produced the required output file and implemented linear regression, openclaw has the most robust and complete implementation with 170 lines of well-structured code
codex's implementation (118 lines) focuses more on metadata generation and error documentation but has less complete screening logic compared to openclaw
claudecode's implementation (139 lines) returns None for get_stock_data() making it non-executable, whereas openclaw actually attempts to fetch real data
All agents correctly identified that data access was unavailable in the environment, but openclaw demonstrated the most thorough attempt to implement the full solution
merge_notes: All three agents (codex, claudecode, openclaw) correctly understood the task requirements and implemented linear regression for volume analysis. The key differentiators are: (1) openclaw has the most complete and executable code with actual data fetching attempts, (2) codex provides excellent metadata and documentation but less complete screening logic, (3) claudecode has good structure but returns mock data. All agents correctly produced the required gentle_rise.txt output file with proper format and headers. The task requires hybrid grading (50% automated, 50% LLM judge) focusing on: continuous rise detection (30%), linear regression implementation (35%), and turnover/comprehensive filtering (35%). openclaw best satisfies all criteria with executable artifacts and proper implementation of all four filtering conditions.
